text: In the last video we saw everything about Dictionary How to make a dictionary What is the importance of Dictionary in Python Programming Language In this video I would like to talk about Dictionary Methods Let's go to the computer screen and let's get started Intro Some of the methods of Dictionary are very useful One of the methods is update Which is used to update the dictionary Let's say I have some employee ID's And their performances I write employee or ep I will make a simple name of the dictionary Let's say I have some employee ID's Let's say it is 1 to 2 and its performance is 45 out of 100 And 1 to 3 and its performance is 89 out of 100 And I have one more employee ID and its performance is 69 out of 100 And 670 is another employee ID Its performance is also 69 out of 100 So what is happening is that we have stored the performance of many people in a variable Now let's say another person comes and he is also a manager He says according to my database I have some other employee ID's Like 2 to 2 employee ID's performance is 67 566 employee ID's performance is 90 So now they decide to do one thing Because he is a senior manager EP1 is a senior manager He says EP2 you are junior than me You give me all your ratings and I will store them in my database So EP1 says ok sir no problem Sorry it is EP2 not EP1 EP1 is a senior I forget EP2 says ok sir you take all my ratings So what will EP1 do? EP1 will update itself with the values and key value pairs I should say items of EP2 So if I run this method once So I just need to run And once I will print EP1 So I will see that these two performances have also come in it You can see 2 to 2 67 566 90 has also come Now the set is unordered in python You must know this But the dictionary is ordered from python 3.7 onwards So set unordered python dictionary ordered So in this way we can use the update method Now we can use the clear method to clear all the dictionaries So if I do not do this here If I say ep1.clear So what will happen? EP1 will be completely empty And an empty dictionary will be printed here How to make an empty dictionary? If I do this So this is an empty dictionary So if I print the empty dictionary So an empty dictionary will be printed Similarly we have a pop method Which removes the key value pairs So if I show you here If I say here ep1.pop122 So what I will do is I will remove this key value pair So see 123, 567 and 670 By the way, I will tell you I have commented out the method of update That's why you can't see the values So by pop I can remove a key value pair What does pop item do? It removes the last key value pair from a dictionary So what you have to do is If you want this entry to be removed from ep1 So what you will do is You will use pop item here And you will write 670 here What will happen by writing 670? That your pop item method Sorry I don't need to write 670 I will just write pop item And automatically 670 will be removed from here So you can see here Now the print of ep1 There is no 670 in it So I just need to write pop item And my last key value pair Will be removed from my dictionary Again there is a del keyword Which we saw in set What does this del keyword do? It deletes the whole dictionary So if you have written del here Suppose I have written here del ep1 Then I will get an error Now line no.9 will say What is ep1? And it will give an error That ep1 is not defined So we can do such things with dictionary So I will comment this So that we don't get to see This not defined error If key is not provided Then the del keyword will delete the dictionary Entirely If you didn't delete like this By giving a key Then the whole dictionary will be deleted Like we did here But if you give a key You say that I want to delete 122 Sorry not 122 as a string Because 122 is an integer So I will write 122 like this So the entry 122 colon 45 Will be deleted from my dictionary What if I write it like this As a string I will say that if you delete 122 Then you will get a key error Many people get confused in this That 122 was in my dictionary Why am I getting a key error? So you are getting a key error Because you are seeing 122 as a string And as an integer The key in ep1 Is as an integer So you should know this So I will do it again So that the error doesn't come I hope you understood this So exactly the same things Which we saw for list, tuple Set, dictionary There are some methods There is a data type It has some uses Whenever you want to create a mapping of
